#  View Drawings (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Drawings can be viewed in offline mode if they were previously viewed and cached on the mobile device.
    * Connected drawings have a **connected** ![Icon Connectability Connected](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5980a303ffec01c011baa9ddec46dde3/3c3c215120ef7bf2676c61d220335bc3/icon-connectability-connected.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool using the Procore app on an Android device.
  2. If necessary, tap the **download** [Sync and Download Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/sync-and-download-drawings-android).  
_Note:_ You can switch between Grid or List view for drawings by tapping the **grid** ![Icon Grid View Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b40f94fd6b99ee9e675cb9a943cb07d8/75c24b17e518f795182b1267c541f2e8/icon-grid-view-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=19) or **list** ![Icon List View Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/031f7f5b863b8dac08339f90ae1314f6/cc72cb16eafb01cc1bf6aae97ae4c7dd/icon-list-view-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon at the top of the screen.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to view.
  4. The following actions are available:  
![Drawings Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ede966733c97c2eb749a2251f42b0791/1bc3d898edd7e9bc8af98c9d9a0759c2/drawings-android.png?fm=webp)


![Number1](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a8c156ef996121c556be22ace48b8035/8db62b69355b63dbebefe3f7b063ed8f/number1.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap **X** if you want to return to the drawing log.
![Number2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ded8fd93c4e2ff950b6a9b5928b0b4fe/b5477cb01908f628cd71da2a2f812e9b/number2.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap **Recent** to view a list of recently viewed drawings.
![Number3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9ca777aedc0b52caf91edb85e6e95773/f7029a8b16923180510aabb02c33f1ea/number3.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap **Compare Drawings** to compare the current drawing with another revision or drawing. See [Compare Drawings (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/compare-drawings-android).
![Number4](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/467ddcf9f055357b1379ed40a53e4c96/3d5d2decb3c0631d87ce24ad06960024/number4.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap **Filters** to toggle between the Published and Personal layers or drawing markups. See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)
![Number5](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1c5d616f5d0ff93db9037bb0dd4bf184/9d76240773a328a4432bc4429ffcfd94/number5.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap **Attachments** to view any attachments that have been added as attachments or markups to the drawing.
![Number6](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1b5013d3b5446766b6a7a4339c7a264f/eb0d6735c16db18145f4ee0a15706c0d/number6.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap ![Vertical Ellipsis](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/06322bf2436ed403cbbcbb114956054d/83700610c54c29243b55a0c635322341/vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp) to access the following options:
  * **Attachments:** Tap to view attachments (if any) that have been added to the drawing.
  * **Snapshot:** Tap to download or email a snapshot of the drawing.
  * **Print:** Tap to print the drawing using a connected printer.
  * **Download:** Tap to download the drawing to your device.
  * **Email:** Tap to email the drawing to users in the project.


![Number7](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b8c719f927e12d9afb9b445c9b1ca410/662e650e570a3694c3bd701c765e5cff/number7.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap a tool in the **Markup** toolbar to mark up the drawing. See [Mark up a Drawing (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-android)._Note:_ To view an item that has been linked on a drawing, tap the linked item on the markup.
![Number8](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/96023e300f68e761ea7ac55981ea2ba7/6173e7556f20900f997834780f0c2561/number8.png?fm=webp&h=25) Tap the left or right arrows to switch to different drawings.
## See Also
  * [View Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawing-markups-android)
  * [View Drawing Area (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/view-drawing-area-android)
  * [Drawings (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/permissions)
title: View Drawings (Android)
description: How to view a drawing in the project's Drawings tool using the Procore Android app.
